en.title: App Creator
en.summary: Write, compile, and install wapps from inside geogram
en.body: Full development environment for geogram wapps. Write C code against the HAL API, compile to WebAssembly with the bundled wasm-clang compiler, design UI screens with the visual editor, manage translations, and install directly to the launcher. No external tools needed.

pt.title: Criador de Apps
pt.summary: Escreva, compile e instale wapps dentro do geogram
pt.body: Ambiente de desenvolvimento completo para wapps geogram. Escreva codigo C contra a API HAL, compile para WebAssembly com o compilador wasm-clang incluido, desenhe ecras UI com o editor visual, gira traducoes e instale diretamente no launcher.

de.title: App Creator
de.summary: Wapps direkt in geogram schreiben, kompilieren und installieren
de.body: Vollstaendige Entwicklungsumgebung fuer geogram-Wapps. C-Code gegen die HAL-API schreiben, mit dem mitgelieferten wasm-clang-Compiler zu WebAssembly kompilieren, UI-Screens mit dem visuellen Editor gestalten, Uebersetzungen verwalten und direkt im Launcher installieren.

changelog:
## 0.1.0
- Initial release with C compiler, UI editor, translations tab
- NOSTR signing integration
- Project management with fork/edit/delete
